<content>
1: /* ─── TOKENS ─── */
2: :root {
3:   --bg:           #f4f6f5;
4:   --surface:      #ffffff;
5:   --text:         #111827;
6:   --muted:        #4b5563;
7:   --subtle:       #9ca3af;
8:   --brand:        #1a7a5e;
9:   --brand-dark:   #135e48;
10:   --brand-light:  #e6f4f0;
11:   --accent:       #f59e0b;
12:   --line:         #e5e7eb;
13:   --radius-sm:    8px;
14:   --radius-md:    14px;
15:   --radius-lg:    20px;
16:   --shadow-sm:    0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
17:   --shadow-md:    0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.09);
18:   --shadow-lg:    0 16px 56px rgba(0,0,0,.13);
19: }
20: 
21: /* ─── RESET ─── */
22: *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
23: 
24: html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
25: 
26: body {
27:   font-family: "Plus Jakarta Sans", system-ui, sans-serif;
28:   font-size: 1rem;
29:   line-height: 1.65;
30:   color: var(--text);
31:   background: var(--bg);
32:   -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
33: }
34: 
35: img { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
36: a   { color: inherit; }
37: 
38: h1, h2, h3 {
39:   font-family: "Bricolage Grotesque", system-ui, sans-serif;
40:   line-height: 1.1;
41:   letter-spacing: -0.02em;
42: }
43: 
44: /* ─── TOPBAR ─── */
45: .topbar {
46:   position: sticky;
47:   top: 0;
48:   z-index: 30;
49:   display: flex;
50:   align-items: center;
51:   justify-content: space-between;
52:   gap: 1rem;
53:   padding: 0 clamp(1.5rem, 5vw, 3rem);
54:   height: 62px;
55:   border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
56:   background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
57:   backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
58: }
59: 
60: .brand {
61:   font-family: "Bricolage Grotesque", sans-serif;
62:   font-size: 1.05rem;
63:   font-weight: 700;
64:   text-decoration: none;
65:   white-space: nowrap;
66:   letter-spacing: -0.02em;
67:   color: var(--brand-dark);
68: }
69: 
70: .menu {
71:   display: flex;
72:   gap: 0.15rem;
73: }
74: 
75: .menu a {
76:   padding: 0.4rem 0.8rem;
77:   border-radius: 999px;
78:   font-size: 0.875rem;
79:   font-weight: 500;
80:   color: var(--muted);
81:   text-decoration: none;
82:   transition: background 150ms, color 150ms;
83: }
84: 
85: .menu a:hover {
86:   background: var(--line);
87:   color: var(--text);
88: }
89: 
90: .cta {
91:   display: inline-flex;
92:   align-items: center;
93:   padding: 0.5rem 1.1rem;
94:   border-radius: 999px;
95:   background: var(--brand);
96:   color: #fff;
97:   font-size: 0.875rem;
98:   font-weight: 600;
99:   text-decoration: none;
100:   white-space: nowrap;
101:   transition: background 150ms;
102: }
103: 
104: .cta:hover { background: var(--brand-dark); }
105: 
106: /* ─── LAYOUT WRAPPER ─── */
107: main {
108:   max-width: 1160px;
109:   margin: 0 auto;
110:   padding: 2.5rem clamp(1rem, 4vw, 2.5rem) 0;
111:   display: flex;
112:   flex-direction: column;
113:   gap: 1.5rem;
114: }
115: 
116: /* ─── HERO ─── */
117: .hero {
118:   display: grid;
119:   grid-template-columns: 1fr 460px;
120:   gap: 1.25rem;
121:   align-items: stretch;
122: }
123: 
124: .hero-image {
125:   position: relative;
126:   border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
127:   overflow: hidden;
128:   min-height: 440px;
129:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
130: }
131: 
132: .hero-image img {
133:   height: 100%;
134:   object-position: center 60%;
135: }
136: 
137: .hero-content {
138:   background: var(--surface);
139:   border: 1px solid var(--line);
140:   border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
141:   padding: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.25rem);
142:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
143:   display: flex;
144:   flex-direction: column;
145: }
146: 
147: .eyebrow {
148:   font-size: 0.7rem;
149:   font-weight: 700;
150:   letter-spacing: 0.12em;
151:   text-transform: uppercase;
152:   color: var(--brand);
153:   margin-bottom: 0.65rem;
154: }
155: 
156: h1 {
157:   font-size: clamp(1.9rem, 3.2vw, 2.6rem);
158:   font-weight: 800;
159:   margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
160:   color: var(--text);
161: }
162: 
163: .hero-sub {
164:   color: var(--muted);
165:   font-size: 1rem;
166:   margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
167:   line-height: 1.7;
168: }
169: 
170: .hero-stats {
171:   display: flex;
172:   align-items: center;
173:   gap: 0;
174:   padding: 1rem 0;
175:   border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
176:   border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
177:   margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
178: }
179: 
180: .stat {
181:   flex: 1;
182:   display: flex;
183:   flex-direction: column;
184:   align-items: center;
185:   gap: 0.1rem;
186: }
187: 
188: .stat strong {
189:   font-size: 1.2rem;
190:   font-weight: 700;
191:   font-family: "Bricolage Grotesque", sans-serif;
192: }
193: 
194: .stat span {
195:   font-size: 0.72rem;
196:   color: var(--muted);
197:   text-align: center;
198:   font-weight: 500;
199: }
200: 
201: .stat-divider {
202:   width: 1px;
203:   height: 28px;
204:   background: var(--line);
205: }
206: 
207: .hero-actions {
208:   display: flex;
209:   flex-direction: column;
210:   gap: 0.65rem;
211:   margin-top: auto;
212: }
213: 
214: .button {
215:   display: inline-flex;
216:   align-items: center;
217:   justify-content: center;
218:   padding: 0.75rem 1.4rem;
219:   border-radius: 999px;
220:   font-size: 0.9rem;
221:   font-weight: 600;
222:   text-decoration: none;
223:   text-align: center;
224:   transition: all 160ms ease;
225:   border: 1.5px solid transparent;
226: }
227: 
228: .button.primary {
229:   background: var(--brand);
230:   color: #fff;
231: }
232: 
233: .button.primary:hover { background: var(--brand-dark); }
234: 
235: .button.secondary {
236:   background: transparent;
237:   border-color: var(--line);
238:   color: var(--text);
239: }
240: 
241: .button.secondary:hover { background: var(--line); }
242: 
243: /* ─── HIGHLIGHTS ─── */
244: .highlights {
245:   display: grid;
246:   grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
247:   gap: 1rem;
248: }
249: 
250: .highlight-card {
251:   background: var(--surface);
252:   border: 1px solid var(--line);
253:   border-radius: var(--radius-md);
254:   padding: 1.4rem;
255:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
256:   transition: box-shadow 200ms, transform 200ms;
257: }
258: 
259: .highlight-card:hover {
260:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
261:   transform: translateY(-3px);
262: }
263: 
264: .hi-icon {
265:   width: 44px;
266:   height: 44px;
267:   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
268:   background: var(--brand-light);
269:   display: flex;
270:   align-items: center;
271:   justify-content: center;
272:   margin-bottom: 1rem;
273: }
274: 
275: .hi-icon svg {
276:   width: 20px;
277:   height: 20px;
278:   color: var(--brand);
279: }
280: 
281: .highlight-card h3 {
282:   font-size: 0.95rem;
283:   font-weight: 700;
284:   margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
285:   letter-spacing: -0.01em;
286: }
287: 
288: .highlight-card p {
289:   font-size: 0.875rem;
290:   color: var(--muted);
291:   line-height: 1.6;
292: }
293: 
294: /* ─── SECTION BASE ─── */
295: .section {
296:   background: var(--surface);
297:   border: 1px solid var(--line);
298:   border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
299:   padding: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.5rem);
300:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
301: }
302: 
303: .section-label {
304:   font-size: 0.7rem;
305:   font-weight: 700;
306:   letter-spacing: 0.12em;
307:   text-transform: uppercase;
308:   color: var(--brand);
309:   margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
310: }
311: 
312: .section h2 {
313:   font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.4vw, 1.9rem);
314:   margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
315:   font-weight: 700;
316: }
317: 
318: /* ─── AMENITY GRID ─── */
319: .amenity-grid {
320:   display: grid;
321:   grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
322:   gap: 0.75rem;
323: }
324: 
325: .amenity {
326:   display: flex;
327:   align-items: flex-start;
328:   gap: 0.8rem;
329:   padding: 1rem;
330:   border: 1px solid var(--line);
331:   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
332:   background: var(--bg);
333:   transition: border-color 150ms;
334: }
335: 
336: .amenity:hover {
337:   border-color: var(--brand-light);
338: }
339: 
340: .amenity svg {
341:   flex-shrink: 0;
342:   width: 20px;
343:   height: 20px;
344:   margin-top: 2px;
345:   color: var(--brand);
346: }
347: 
348: .amenity div {
349:   display: flex;
350:   flex-direction: column;
351:   gap: 0.15rem;
352: }
353: 
354: .amenity strong {
355:   font-size: 0.875rem;
356:   font-weight: 600;
357: }
358: 
359: .amenity span {
360:   font-size: 0.8rem;
361:   color: var(--muted);
362: }
363: 
364: /* ─── LAGE ─── */
365: .lage-section {
366:   display: grid;
367:   grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
368:   gap: 0;
369:   align-items: stretch;
370:   padding: 0;
371:   overflow: hidden;
372: }
373: 
374: .lage-text {
375:   padding: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.5rem);
376: }
377: 
378: .lage-text h2 {
379:   margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
380:   font-weight: 700;
381: }
382: 
383: .lage-text p {
384:   color: var(--muted);
385:   margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
386: }
387: 
388: .checklist {
389:   list-style: none;
390:   display: flex;
391:   flex-direction: column;
392:   gap: 0.55rem;
393: }
394: 
395: .checklist li {
396:   display: flex;
397:   align-items: center;
398:   gap: 0.65rem;
399:   font-size: 0.925rem;
400:   font-weight: 500;
401: }
402: 
403: .checklist svg {
404:   flex-shrink: 0;
405:   width: 16px;
406:   height: 16px;
407:   color: var(--brand);
408: }
409: 
410: .lage-image {
411:   height: 100%;
412:   min-height: 320px;
413: }
414: 
415: .lage-image img {
416:   height: 100%;
417:   object-position: center center;
418: }
419: 
420: /* ─── GALLERY ─── */
421: .gallery {
422:   display: grid;
423:   grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
424:   gap: 0.75rem;
425:   border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
426:   overflow: hidden;
427: }
428: 
429: .gallery img {
430:   height: 210px;
431:   border-radius: var(--radius-md);
432:   transition: transform 300ms ease, box-shadow 300ms;
433:   cursor: pointer;
434: }
435: 
436: .gallery img:hover {
437:   transform: scale(1.025);
438:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
439:   z-index: 1;
440:   position: relative;
441: }
442: 
443: /* ─── CONTACT BANNER ─── */
444: .contact-banner {
445:   border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
446:   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0d2b22 0%, #1a4a35 55%, #1a7a5e 100%);
447:   padding: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem);
448:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
449:   color: #fff;
450: }
451: 
452: .contact-inner {
453:   display: flex;
454:   align-items: center;
455:   justify-content: space-between;
456:   gap: 2rem;
457: }
458: 
459: .contact-text h2 {
460:   font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 2.8vw, 2.2rem);
461:   margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
462:   color: #fff;
463:   font-weight: 700;
464: }
465: 
466: .contact-text p {
467:   color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65);
468:   max-width: 42ch;
469: }
470: 
471: .contact-actions {
472:   display: flex;
473:   flex-direction: column;
474:   gap: 0.75rem;
475:   flex-shrink: 0;
476: }
477: 
478: .contact-link {
479:   display: inline-flex;
480:   align-items: center;
481:   gap: 0.75rem;
482:   padding: 0.85rem 1.4rem;
483:   border-radius: var(--radius-md);
484:   font-weight: 600;
485:   font-size: 0.9rem;
486:   text-decoration: none;
487:   transition: all 160ms;
488:   white-space: nowrap;
489: }
490: 
491: .contact-link svg {
492:   width: 18px;
493:   height: 18px;
494:   flex-shrink: 0;
495: }
496: 
497: .contact-link.email {
498:   background: #fff;
499:   color: var(--brand-dark);
500: }
501: 
502: .contact-link.email:hover {
503:   background: var(--brand-light);
504: }
505: 
506: .contact-link.phone {
507:   background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
508:   color: #fff;
509:   border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
510: }
511: 
512: .contact-link.phone:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18); }
513: 
514: /* ─── FOOTER ─── */
515: footer {
516:   max-width: 1160px;
517:   margin: 2.5rem auto 0;
518:   padding: 2rem clamp(1rem, 4vw, 2.5rem);
519:   border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
520:   display: flex;
521:   justify-content: space-between;
522:   align-items: center;
523:   color: var(--muted);
524:   font-size: 0.85rem;
525:   gap: 1rem;
526:   flex-wrap: wrap;
527: }
528: 
529: .footer-sub { color: var(--subtle); }
530: 
531: /* ─── BESCHREIBUNG ─── */
532: .description-section {
533:   display: grid;
534:   grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
535:   gap: 2rem;
536:   align-items: start;
537: }
538: 
539: .desc-text h2 {
540:   margin-bottom: 1rem;
541:   font-weight: 700;
542: }
543: 
544: .desc-text p {
545:   color: var(--muted);
546:   margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
547:   font-size: 0.97rem;
548: }
549: 
550: .desc-note {
551:   font-size: 0.82rem !important;
552:   color: var(--subtle) !important;
553:   border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
554:   padding-top: 0.75rem;
555:   margin-top: 0.5rem;
556: }
557: 
558: .desc-images {
559:   display: grid;
560:   grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
561:   gap: 0.75rem;
562: }
563: 
564: .desc-images img {
565:   height: 180px;
566:   border-radius: var(--radius-md);
567:   object-fit: cover;
568: }
569: 
570: /* ─── RESPONSIVE ─── */
571: @media (max-width: 1024px) {
572:   .amenity-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
573: }
574: 
575: @media (max-width: 860px) {
576:   .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
577:   .hero-image { min-height: 300px; }
578:   .hero-actions { flex-direction: row; }
579:   .highlights { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
580:   .description-section { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
581:   .lage-section { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
582:   .lage-image { min-height: 220px; }
583:   .contact-inner { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
584:   .contact-actions { width: 100%; }
585:   .contact-link { justify-content: center; }
586: }
587: 
588: @media (max-width: 600px) {
589:   .topbar { padding: 0 1rem; }
590:   .menu { display: none; }
591:   .highlights { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
592:   .amenity-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
593:   .gallery { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
594:   .desc-images { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
595:   footer { flex-direction: column; text-align: center; }
596: }
